description: Style NoteSoft on the inside and sporty on the outside, you and these pants make a great pair. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these tracks allow easy movement and do not lose shape even after years. While the soft fabric keeps you cool, the polyester helps you stretch with much ease. Pair it with a t-shirt  and achieve maximum performance on and off the field.Product DetailsWhite three quarter track pants with an elasticated waistband and drawstring on the inside, two insert pockets on the sides, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket, embroidered logo on the left leg, drawstring at hemMaterial and CareShell: 100% polyesterLining: 65% polyester and 35% cottonGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry at low temperatureWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
